why_vmf_not_fcm: FCM uses Euclidean distance ratios for membership. In 256-D unit-vector space all pairwise distances concentrate around 2*(1-mean_cosine_sim), making ratios indistinguishable → uniform memberships. vMF uses cosine similarity directly, which IS discriminative in this geometry.
